description.ko: 생물 발광 생명체들이 심해의 압도적인 어둠을 신비로운 네온 빛으로 밝히는 미드나잇 존으로의 매혹적인 여정입니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing journey into the midnight zone of the ocean, where bioluminescent creatures light up the crushing darkness of the abyss with ethereal neon glows.

prompt: Cinematic underwater photography, deep ocean abyss, bioluminescent jellyfish and mysterious aquatic creatures glowing in neon blue and violet, floating organic particles, high pressure environment, 8k resolution, photorealistic, ethereal lighting, dark midnight water background, high contrast.
